text:
Built an n8n integration for @withcoral — turning the n8n REST API into queryable SQL tables with server-side filter pushdowns, cursor pagination, and cross-source JOINs.

Thanks @WeMakeDevs, and @kunalstwt for the amazing learning opportunity! 🏴‍☠️
